psinematics.spellerror.nullconstruct: ERROR: Spell Construct target is non existent.
psinematics.spellerror.assembly_already_: ERROR: Assembly is already in progress.
psinematics.spellerror.imbalanced_begin_: Begin Assembly requires later End Assembly trick
End Assembly requires earlier Begin Assembly trick
psinematics.spellpiece.current_sub_level: Returns the construct that the caster is inside of
psinematics.spellpiece.containing_sub_le: Returns the construct that the target point is inside of
psinematics.spellpiece.locate_center_of_: Locates the center of mass of the target construct
psinematics.spellpiece.begin_assembly.de: Begins creation of a new construct (via blockworks spells)
psinematics.spellpiece.end_assembly.desc: Completes a constructed started by Begin Assembly
